```js title=main.js
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["main"], {
"./child/child/index.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
"use strict";
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.r(__rspack_exports);
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  value: () => (value)
});
const value = "dynamic";


},
"./child/index.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
"use strict";
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.r(__rspack_exports);
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  value: () => (value)
});
const value = "dynamic";


},
"./child sync recursive ^\\.\\/.*\\.js$"(module, __unused_rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
var map = {
  "./child/index.js": "./child/child/index.js",
  "./index.js": "./child/index.js"
};


function __rspack_context(req) {
  var id = __rspack_context_resolve(req);
  return __rspack_require(id);
}
function __rspack_context_resolve(req) {
  if(!__rspack_require.o(map, req)) {
    var e = new Error("Cannot find module '" + req + "'");
    e.code = 'MODULE_NOT_FOUND';
    throw e;
  }
  return map[req];
}
__rspack_context.keys = () => (Object.keys(map));
__rspack_context.resolve = __rspack_context_resolve;
module.exports = __rspack_context;
__rspack_context.id = "./child sync recursive ^\\.\\/.*\\.js$";


},
"./index.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __unused_rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
let a = "index";
__rspack_require("./child sync recursive ^\\.\\/.*\\.js$")(`./${a}.js`);


},

},function(__rspack_require) {
var __rspack_exec = function(moduleId) { return __rspack_require(__rspack_require.s = moduleId) }
var __rspack_exports = (__rspack_exec("./index.js"));

}
]);
```
